title: Mine RPG
description: My relatively lite fantasy modpack for my friends
body:
# Minecraft with More Depth and Dungeons
This pack is for me and my friends to have a good time! Will it be made into something more significant in the future? Maybe. Until then, game on, buddies!
# Features
### A World to Explore
This pack includes improvements to world generation, structures, and even adds seasons! A much more exciting world for you to explore.
### Faster Than Ever
With fine-tuned performance enhancements, this pack is meant to run on older, smaller machines. Hopefully, even your slower pc friends will still have a great time!
